free_text: Inclusive spectra of 3H and 3He nuclei and angular
distributions of dinucleons in the d+t reaction at
Russian ver. of J,BAS,64,370,2000
Isochronous cyclotron U-120
Tritium-titanium target with thickness of 2.5 mg/cm2
(content of tritium nuclei 40%) was used in d,t
measurements.
In background and calibration measurements titanium
foil with thickness of 2.5 mg/cm2 and films of C-12,
CH2, CD2 with thickness of 0.5 mg/cm2 were used.
Tritium-titanium target with thickness of 1.0 mg/cm2
on copper backing thick 5 um was used in d,3He
measurements.
Four deltaE-E telescopes. Thicknesses:
deltaE-detector- 50-100 um, E-detector- 1.5-2 mm
for singly charged particles and deltaE-detector- 20
um, E-detector- 300 um for 3He registration.
Detectors were placed on two independent platforms:
two detectors at the left and the other two detectors
at the right from the beam. Diaphragms (3 mm in
diameter) were placed immediately in front of delta-
E detectors at the distance of 60 cm from the target.
One E-detector located at angle of 60 degrees to beam
was used as monitor.
Corrected for background
Statistical error
Data were received from author
UKRNDC
